name: Steven Greer
summary: Founder of the Disclosure Project and organizer of the influential 2001 National Press Club witness event.
profileSummary: Founder of the Disclosure Project and organizer of the influential 2001 National Press Club witness event.
background: Physician, author, lecturer, and disclosure activist.
inclusionNote: Included because his witness events, document releases, films, and advocacy strongly influenced public UFO disclosure culture, despite ongoing controversy surrounding some claims and methods.
